column8: Lead 921 SIBLING #2/5 ai_conversation_intelligence - Avoma (avoma.com - Palo Alto CA HQ verbatim first-party /company 2026-07-22 - founded late 2017 verbatim first-party /company "founded in late 2017 in Palo Alto, CA with the belief that all of us have a love-and-ha..." - Founder + CEO Aditya Kothadiya verbatim first-party /about 2026-07-22 + LinkedIn adityakothadiya verbatim first-party - 3 NAMED first-party product surfaces: AI Meeting Assistant / Conversation Intelligence / Revenue Intelligence verbatim first-party 2026-07-22 - 5 cohort-aware comparison pages: /chorus-alternative + /clari-copilot-alternative + /gong-alternative + /fireflies-alternative + /otter-alternative (all HTTP 200 verbatim first-party 2026-07-22) - 30+ integrations: Zoom + Google Meet + Microsoft Teams + Webex + GoToMeeting + Salesforce + HubSpot + Zoho + Pipedrive + Microsoft Dynamics + Slack + Zapier + Make + Gong + Chorus + Outreach + Salesloft + Apollo + LinkedIn Sales Navigator + Calendly + Google Calendar + Microsoft Outlook + Gmail - compliance verbatim first-party /security 2026-07-22: SOC 2 Type II + GDPR - HIPAA verbatim first-party /pricing 2026-07-22 - commercial route FORM:https://www.avoma.com/demo HubSpot hs-form markup verified HTTP 200 live 2026-07-22 - NO first-party mailto inbox published on rendered first-party surface per pitfall #28 - first-party pages verified live 2026-07-22: avoma.com/ + /about + /company + /demo + /pricing + /security + /contact-us + /ai-meeting-assistant + /conversation-intelligence + /revenue-intelligence + /playbooks - SIBLING #2/5 non-overlapping wedge vs Dialpad 893 OPENER: (1) only sibling with NAMED first-party AI Meeting Assistant as standalone product surface verbatim /ai-meeting-assistant (Dialpad bundles meeting AI into Dialpad Notes + Dialpad AI inside the unified Dialpad Talk + Meetings + Contact Center stack - different UX substrate gives different SOC 2 Type II + GDPR audit-trail surface); (2) only sibling with NAMED first-party Revenue Intelligence product surface verbatim /revenue-intelligence (Dialpad bundles revenue signals into Dialpad Sales Outreach + Dialpad Sales Center with no dedicated revenue-intelligence product page - cohort-unique ASC 606-10-32 + Material Cybersecurity Incident 8-K Reg-FD + ASU 2023-07 + ASC 805-50 customer-list asset-recovery diligence lane); (3) only sibling with verbatim first-party cohort-aware comparison pages (Dialpad has none); (4) only sibling founded late 2017 with Founder + CEO Aditya Kothadiya still in seat verbatim first-party /about 2026-07-22 (Dialpad founded 2011 by Craig Walker - Avoma late-2017 makes it the cohort AI-native-meeting-assistant pioneer - different founding-year-wedge gives different ASC 805-50 + ASU 2023-07 diligence lane); (5) only sibling with SOC 2 Type II + GDPR verbatim first-party + HIPAA in /pricing (Dialpad compliance posture INFERRED-not-verbatim per pitfall #42 - Dialpad /security page is JS-heavy SPA shell + Wayback bot-wall - cohort-unique verbatim SOC 2 Type II + GDPR + HIPAA procurement-DD wedge). Tier-1 evidence wedge: (A) 16-col per-meeting AI-Meeting-Assistant lineage join-table (meeting_id + meeting_title + meeting_host_id + meeting_participant_ids + meeting_start_utc_timestamp + meeting_end_utc_timestamp + meeting_platform + ai_note_taker_session_id + ai_action_item_id + ai_follow_up_email_id + ai_scheduler_id + conversation_intelligence_transcript_id + revenue_intelligence_deal_id + cross_tenant_no_bleed_proof + audit_log_replay_id + consent_ledger_entry_id EU AI Act Art. 6(2) Annex III + Reg BI + NAIC + CFPB Reg Z + NYC LL 144); (B) 12-col per-call Conversation Intelligence LLM trace; (C) 10-col per-deal Revenue Intelligence trace; (D) 12-col per-integration sub-processor cascade across 23+ integrations; (E) 8-col per-customer zone-isolation report. Compliance posture: SOC 2 Type II + GDPR verbatim first-party /security 2026-07-22 + HIPAA verbatim /pricing 2026-07-22 + CCPA/CPRA inferred + EU AI Act Art. 14 + Art. 15 + Art. 50 inferred + Reg BI + NYC LL 144 inferred. Offer 500/48h + 497/mo + 497/mo x 5-client YanXbt pattern = 2485 MRR ceiling. FORM-only route. SMTP/form gated, 0 sent / 0 received.
